headline: Saturday is not your excuse day—execute discipline today
summary: You're gaining when you should be losing; Saturday is your weakness window—stick to Huel and hit the machine today.
details: Replace snacking impulses with two Huel meals today—zero emotional eating, zero portion guessing. Put 45 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill this afternoon. This Saturday action matters: one disciplined day moves you 0.92 kg closer to breaking your gaining streak and re-establishing the losing pace you need to hit 88 kg on schedule.
